headline: What I'm working on right now

items.title: GraphLatentCast
items.one_liner: Why do graph-based weather models lose physical consistency as forecast lead time grows?
items.current_focus: Tracing latent space trajectories in GenCast to find where physical structure breaks down across forecast lead times.

items.title: npj Climate and Atmospheric Science paper
items.one_liner: Spectral test of the butterfly effect and physical consistency in GenCast's diffusion-based ensembles.

items.title: Paper I'm currently digesting
items.note: Diffusion models as energy-based models — thinking about what the score function implies for how uncertainty is structured in latent representations.
